issues.description: Missing required condition: 'HasRestingCharacters' or equivalent to check '2 or more rested Characters'. The effect should only activate if this condition is met.
Action type is 'Rest' but effect text says 'set up to 1...as active' (meaning unrest/activate). Should be a custom action like 'Unrest' or 'SetActive', not 'Rest'.
Target filter is incomplete. Must include: scope='ChooseOwnCharacter', hasType='ODYSSEY', maxCost=5, AND filter for rested characters only (hasRestingStatus or similar).
